title: Switch inventory to a weight-based carry system
decision: We will replace the slot-based inventory with a weight-based system capped per character strength.
context: Slot-based inventory was blocking stacking of crafting materials and felt inconsistent with the survival tone of the game.

options_considered.cons: Still allows carrying unrealistic amounts of heavy gear

options_considered.pros: Matches survival tone, encourages loadout decisions
options_considered.cons: Requires UI rework and rebalancing all item weights

rationale: Weight-based best supports the survival identity even though it costs more UI work up front.
non_goals: Encumbrance debuffs beyond a hard carry cap
open_questions: Should mounts/pack animals get separate weight pools?
